name: Yext, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Yext,Inc. (Yext, the Company, we, us or our) empowers businesses to manage their knowledge so they can deliver relevant, actionable answers to consumer questions as well as consistent, accurate and engaging experiences to customers throughout the digital ecosystem.
